description.sv: Välj chilimarinerad kyckling eller grönsaksbiffar i masalasås. Salladsmix, linser, avokado, mango, koriander, nötmix, friterad lök, chutney & mangochutney.
description.en: Choose chili-marinated chicken or vegetable patties in masala sauce. Salad mix, lentils, avocado, mango, coriander, nut mix, fried onion, chutney & mango chutney.
